\tzpentry{ID3345}{Angular Velocity Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3345 introduces Angular Velocity Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} t < \frac{1}{ \Gamma_{ \text{dec}}( \Omega)} \ln \left( \frac{ \sqrt{2}| \cos[ \Delta \Phi( \Omega, t)]|}{1} \right) \end{equation}
